summary.lv: SSI Schaefer meklē Industrial Network inženieri, kas projektēs un uzturēs industriālā tīkla infrastruktūru intralogistikas iekārtām globāli, sadarbojoties ar OT un automatizācijas inženieriem.
summary.en: SSI Schaefer is hiring an Industrial Network Engineer to design and operate industrial network infrastructure for intralogistics equipment globally, partnering with OT and automation engineers.
